seoTitle: Licola North vs Lillico — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Licola North and Lillico. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Licola North vs Lillico: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Licola North and Lillico.
heading: Licola North vs Lillico — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Licola North, Victoria and Lillico, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Lillico has a lower overall climate risk score (34/100) compared to Licola North (40/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Licola North or Lillico safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Licola North has a flood risk score of 55/100, while Lillico scores 40/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Licola North scores 45/100 for bushfire risk. Lillico scores 41/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Licola North or Lillico?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Lillico has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.5% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
